title: Amazon Step Functions State Machine
description: Represents an Amazon Step Functions state machine with its associated configuration, definition, and metadata.

stateMachineArn.description: The ARN that identifies the state machine

name.description: The name of the state machine

status.description: The current status of the state machine

definition.description: The Amazon States Language definition of the state machine as a JSON string

roleArn.description: The ARN of the IAM role used by the state machine for executions

type.description: The type of the state machine (STANDARD or EXPRESS)

creationDate.description: The date the state machine was created

label.description: A user-defined or auto-generated string that identifies a Map state

revisionId.description: The revision identifier for the state machine

description.description: A user-defined description of the state machine

tags.description: Tags attached to the state machine

LoggingConfiguration.description: Logging configuration for the state machine

level.description: Defines which category of execution history events are logged

includeExecutionData.description: Determines whether execution data is included in log messages

destinations.description: Array of objects that describe where logs are sent

logGroupArn.description: The ARN of the CloudWatch Logs log group

TracingConfiguration.description: X-Ray tracing configuration for the state machine

enabled.description: When set to true, X-Ray tracing is enabled

StateMachineDefinition.description: The Amazon States Language definition structure

Comment.description: A human-readable description of the state machine

StartAt.description: The name of the state where execution starts

States.description: An object containing a set of states

TimeoutSeconds.description: The maximum number of seconds an execution can run

Version.description: The version of the Amazon States Language

State.description: A single state in the state machine

Comment.description: A human-readable description of the state

InputPath.description: A path that selects a portion of the state input

OutputPath.description: A path that selects a portion of the state output

Next.description: The name of the next state to transition to

End.description: Designates this state as a terminal state

Resource.description: The ARN of the resource to invoke (for Task states)

Parameters.description: Key-value pairs passed as input to the resource

ResultPath.description: A path that determines what is sent as input to the next state

ResultSelector.description: Key-value pairs to manipulate the result before ResultPath

Choices.description: Array of choice rules (for Choice states)

Default.description: The default state for a Choice state

Seconds.description: The number of seconds to wait (for Wait states)

Timestamp.description: An absolute time to wait until (for Wait states)

Branches.description: Array of parallel branches (for Parallel states)

Iterator.description: The state machine to process each array element (for Map states)

ItemsPath.description: Reference path identifying the array to iterate over (for Map states)

Error.description: The error name for a Fail state

Cause.description: A description for a Fail state

TimeoutSeconds.description: The maximum time in seconds a Task state can run

HeartbeatSeconds.description: The time between heartbeats for a Task state

IntervalSeconds.description: The number of seconds before the first retry attempt

MaxAttempts.description: The maximum number of retry attempts

BackoffRate.description: The multiplier by which the retry interval increases

Catcher.description: A catch clause for error handling

Next.description: The name of the state to transition to

ResultPath.description: A path that determines what is sent as input to the Next state
